non_claims: no engineering facts or design authority asserted
no review readiness or verification completion established

se_assistant_route_packet.storage_boundary: metadata pointers only; no project payloads or actual payload storage under _workmeta

questions: What project_code, mission_id, and project-local run reference should bind this triage?
Which approved source references may be used for intake and sufficiency review?
What supported inputs and owner approval govern an optional foldertree scaffold?
Which owner decisions are required before SYN-SRR gap closure can be assessed?
Is there an accepted review-gate packet or verification result to attach?
What owner-defined closeout criteria should the readiness digest evaluate?

operating_loop_route_map.next: prepare gap request; do not clear stage
confirm safe bounded refs and owner scope
run only after bounded refs and inputs exist
attach accepted evidence and verification state

recommendations: supply project binding and approved references
obtain accepted review and verification evidence
then request bounded readiness digest and closeout review

boundary_review_note.safe_content: route shapes, observed request facts, missing-input queues, workflow recommendations, and non-claims only

completion_state.next_owner_action: provide bindings, approved refs, scaffold inputs, and acceptance criteria
